zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Theobald de Gorges Baron Gorges of Wraxall, Knight Banneret, Lieutenant of Normandy, KB於1401年11月29日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特朗 艾希頓時，他的父親Thomas Gorges32歲，母親Agnes Beauchamp33歲。他於1421年10月15日與Lady Joan (Jane?) de Hanchford (Hankeford), Baroness Gorges,在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年7月4日在英國英格蘭戴文坦莫頓 福利特享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Theobald de Gorges Baron Gorges of Wraxall, Knight Banneret, Lieutenant of Normandy, KB于1401年11月29日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特朗 艾希頓时，他的父亲Thomas Gorges32岁，母亲Agnes Beauchamp33岁。他于1421年10月15日与Lady Joan (Jane?) de Hanchford (Hankeford), Baroness Gorges,在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年7月4日在英国英格兰戴文坦莫頓 福利特享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gorges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Erwin, Heinz, Otto, Wilhelm.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of various places in France named with Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (see Gorge 2).

variants.name: Gorge
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in a deep valley, from Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (from Old French gorge ‘throat’), or a habitational name from any of various places in France named with this word.
English: variant of   Gorges   2 or   George  .

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Theobald de Gorges Baron Gorges of Wraxall, Knight Banneret, Lieutenant of Normandy, KB was born on 29 November 1401, in Long Ashton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Gorges, was 32 and his mother, Agnes Beauchamp, was 33. He married Lady Joan (Jane?) de Hanchford (Hankeford), Baroness Gorges, on 15 October 1421, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 4 July 1470, in Tamerton Foliot, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Theobald de Gorges Baron Gorges of Wraxall, Knight Banneret, Lieutenant of Normandy, KB est né le 29 novembre 1401, à Long Ashton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Gorges, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes Beauchamp, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan (Jane?) de Hanchford (Hankeford), Baroness Gorges, le 15 octobre 1421, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1470, à Tamerton Foliot, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Theobald de Gorges Baron Gorges of Wraxall, Knight Banneret, Lieutenant of Normandy, KB è nato il il 29 novembre 1401 nel Long Ashton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Gorges, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Beauchamp, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joan (Jane?) de Hanchford (Hankeford), Baroness Gorges, il 15 ottobre 1421, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Theobald de Gorges Baron Gorges of Wraxall, Knight Banneret, Lieutenant of Normandy, KBが1401年11月29日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトロング アシュトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Gorgesは32歳，母Agnes Beauchampは33歳であった。1421年10月15日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでLady Joan (Jane?) de Hanchford (Hankeford), Baroness Gorges,と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年7月4日にイギリスイギリスデボンタムルトン フォリオトで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Theobald de Gorges Baron Gorges of Wraxall, Knight Banneret, Lieutenant of Normandy, KB(이)가 1401년 11월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 론그 애슈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Gorges(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Beauchamp(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1421년 10월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Lady Joan (Jane?) de Hanchford (Hankeford), Baroness Gorges,(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 7월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 타머턴 폴리엇에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Theobald de Gorges Baron Gorges of Wraxall, Knight Banneret, Lieutenant of Normandy, KB nasceu em 29 de novembro de 1401, em Long Ashton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Gorges, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Beauchamp, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joan (Jane?) de Hanchford (Hankeford), Baroness Gorges, em 15 de outubro de 1421, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de julho de 1470, em Tamerton Foliot, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Theobald de Gorges Baron Gorges of Wraxall, Knight Banneret, Lieutenant of Normandy, KB родился 29 ноября 1401 г. в местности лонг аштон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Gorges было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Beauchamp, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan (Jane?) de Hanchford (Hankeford), Baroness Gorges, 15 октября 1421 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 4 июля 1470 г. в местности тамиртон фолиот, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Theobald de Gorges Baron Gorges of Wraxall, Knight Banneret, Lieutenant of Normandy, KB nació el 29 de noviembre de 1401, en Long Ashton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Gorges, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Agnes Beauchamp, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lady Joan (Jane?) de Hanchford (Hankeford), Baroness Gorges, el 15 de octubre de 1421, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 4 de julio de 1470, en Tamerton Foliot, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
